mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO {{detail_table}} ( comp_cd, {{insert_columns}}, firs_reg_pgm_id, firs_reg_dts, firs_reg_user_id, firs_reg_ip, fina_reg_pgm_id, fina_reg_dts, fina_reg_user_id, fina_reg_ip ) VALUES ( #{login_comp_cd}, {{insert_values}}, #{reg_pgm_id}, now(), #{login_emp_no}, #{login_user_ip}, #{reg_pgm_id}, now(), #{login_emp_no}, #{login_user_ip} )
ON CONFLICT ({{pk_columns}}) DO UPDATE SET {{update_set_columns}}, fina_reg_pgm_id = excluded.firs_reg_pgm_id, fina_reg_dts = now(), fina_reg_user_id = excluded.firs_reg_user_id, fina_reg_ip = excluded.firs_reg_ip
